example_sentence_english: He is not tired, but rather bored.

example_sentence_native: Die Sorge um ihre Kinder machte sie nervös.
example_sentence_english: The worry about her children made her nervous.

example_sentence_native: Ich mag die Soße zum Braten.
example_sentence_english: I like the sauce with the roast.

example_sentence_native: Ich habe soviel zu tun.
example_sentence_english: I have so much to do.

example_sentence_native: Das ist eine typische Speise der Region.
example_sentence_english: This is a typical dish from the region.

example_sentence_native: Wir haben im Speisewagen zu Mittag gegessen.
example_sentence_english: We had lunch in the dining car.

example_sentence_native: Das ist ein ganz spezieller Fall.
example_sentence_english: This is a very special case.

example_sentence_native: Die Schere ist sehr spitz.
example_sentence_english: The scissors are very sharp.

example_sentence_native: Englisch ist meine Zweitsprache.
example_sentence_english: English is my second language.

example_sentence_native: Ich gehe schwimmen statt zu lernen.
example_sentence_english: I'm going swimming instead of studying.

example_sentence_native: Ich muss das Wohnzimmer staubsaugen.
example_sentence_english: I have to vacuum the living room.

example_sentence_native: Der Steward bringt uns Getränke.
example_sentence_english: The steward is bringing us drinks.

example_sentence_native: Das Stiegenhaus ist sehr dunkel.
example_sentence_english: The stairwell is very dark.

example_sentence_native: Wir wohnen in dieser Straße.
example_sentence_english: We live on this street.

example_sentence_native: Ich brauche ein Streichholz, um die Kerze anzuzünden.
example_sentence_english: I need a match to light the candle.

example_sentence_native: Ich habe ein Stück Kuchen gegessen.
example_sentence_english: I ate a piece of cake.

example_sentence_native: Viele Studierende besuchen die Universität.
example_sentence_english: Many students attend the university.

example_sentence_native: Er kämpft gegen seine Sucht nach Schokolade.
example_sentence_english: He is fighting his craving for chocolate.

example_sentence_native: Drogen sind gefährliche Suchtmittel.
example_sentence_english: Drugs are dangerous addictive substances.

example_sentence_native: Die Zahl der Toten ist gestiegen.
example_sentence_english: The number of dead has increased.

example_sentence_native: Bitte gehen Sie auf dem Trottoir.
example_sentence_english: Please walk on the sidewalk.

example_sentence_native: Trotz des Regens gingen wir spazieren.
example_sentence_english: Despite the rain, we went for a walk.

example_sentence_native: Bitte bringen Sie Ihre Unterlagen mit.
example_sentence_english: Please bring your documents.

english_translation: to undertake, to do, to go (on an outing)
example_sentence_native: Wir wollen am Wochenende etwas unternehmen.
example_sentence_english: We want to do something on the weekend.

example_sentence_native: Das Rauchen ist hier untersagt.
example_sentence_english: Smoking is prohibited here.

example_sentence_native: Ich fahre jeden Tag mit dem Velo zur Arbeit.
example_sentence_english: I ride my bike to work every day.

example_sentence_native: Wir sind für Samstag verabredet.
example_sentence_english: We are meeting on Saturday.

example_sentence_native: Das Verhalten des Mannes war sehr verdächtig.
example_sentence_english: The man's behavior was very suspicious.

example_sentence_native: Es ist mir ein Vergnügen, Sie kennenzulernen.
example_sentence_english: It is my pleasure to meet you.

example_sentence_native: Bitte vergrößern Sie das Bild, damit ich die Details sehen kann.
example_sentence_english: Please enlarge the picture so I can see the details.

example_sentence_native: Sein Verhalten war inakzeptabel.
example_sentence_english: His behavior was unacceptable.

example_sentence_native: Sie verlangen zu viel für diese Dienstleistung.
example_sentence_english: They demand too much for this service.

english_translation: to cater for, to provide food and drink
example_sentence_native: Das Hotel verpflegt seine Gäste mit drei Mahlzeiten am Tag.
example_sentence_english: The hotel provides its guests with three meals a day.

example_sentence_native: Jeder Bürger ist verpflichtet, die Gesetze zu befolgen.
example_sentence_english: Every citizen is obliged to follow the laws.

example_sentence_native: Ich habe meine Versichertenkarte beim Arzt vergessen.
example_sentence_english: I forgot my insurance card at the doctor's office.

example_sentence_native: Ich habe großes Vertrauen in dich.
example_sentence_english: I have great trust in you.

example_sentence_native: Meine Verwandten besuchen uns oft.
example_sentence_english: My relatives visit us often.

example_sentence_native: Es gibt viele Möglichkeiten.
example_sentence_english: There are many possibilities.

example_sentence_native: Sie arbeitet Vollzeit in einer Bank.
example_sentence_english: She works full-time in a bank.

example_sentence_native: Wir brauchen einen größeren Wagen.
example_sentence_english: We need a bigger car.

example_sentence_native: Während des Films aßen wir Popcorn.
example_sentence_english: During the movie, we ate popcorn.

example_sentence_native: Der Weg zum Bahnhof ist weit.
example_sentence_english: The way to the train station is long.

example_sentence_native: Wegen des Regens blieben wir zu Hause.
example_sentence_english: Because of the rain, we stayed at home.

example_sentence_native: Er ist müde, weil er spät ins Bett gegangen ist.
example_sentence_english: He is tired because he went to bed late.

example_sentence_native: Das war eine weise Entscheidung.
example_sentence_english: That was a wise decision.

example_sentence_native: Wir müssen weitergehen, um den Gipfel zu erreichen.
example_sentence_english: We must continue walking to reach the summit.

example_sentence_english: Which train goes to Berlin?

example_sentence_english: Only a few people came to the event.

example_sentence_english: If the weather is nice, we go for a walk.

example_sentence_native: Wer hat das gesagt?
example_sentence_english: Who said that?

example_sentence_english: I have a lot of knowledge about this topic.

example_sentence_english: I want to go to the cinema tonight.

example_sentence_native: Das ist eine hohe Zahl.

example_sentence_english: We are eating pasta today.

example_sentence_english: This is my stuff.

example_sentence_english: The bank pays interest.

example_sentence_native: Welche Zutaten brauchen wir für den Kuchen?
example_sentence_english: What ingredients do we need for the cake?

example_sentence_english: After work, I like to eat a small afternoon snack.

example_sentence_english: I'm taking a break for my mid-morning snack.

example_sentence_english: The car was parked between the two trees.
